audience: friend groups already tagging each other about mercury
insight: blaming the retrograde is a shared ritual, and a document makes the ritual sendable
assetXElement: blaming mercury retrograde x an official looking excuse note you can send
successMetric: tag chain length per seeded note

referenceSet.note: pass it on chain format, the artifact names its next recipient

generationPrompts.image: An official looking excuse note card, formal typography reading OFFICIAL RETROGRADE EXCUSE with a blank line for a name and a wax style seal, held between two fingers against a kitchen backdrop, phone camera realism, natural light. No logos, no watermarks. 16:9.
generationPrompts.motion: [for ChatCut] three shot script: shot 1 the excuse note fills in a friend's name; shot 2 it sends and the friend reacts; shot 3 the note regenerates with a blank name and the hook line lands, 6 seconds total
generationPrompts.copy: Write one hook line, 20 words or fewer, granting official permission to blame the planet, deadpan tone, no exclamation marks
